channel.title: Citadel Deep Research
channel.description: Deep research briefings and audio overviews for the Mills Citadel operating system.
channel.itunes:author: Brad Mills / Hermes Agent
channel.itunes:summary: Deep research briefings and audio overviews for the Mills Citadel operating system.

item.title: Real AI Operating Systems Comparison
item.description: A NotebookLM audio overview generated from a curated 13-source full-text pack comparing real AI operating systems for Brad Mills: llm-wiki/G-Brain/Hypatia as the knowledge kernel, Google OKF as the interoperability layer, Obsidian/Claude as an optional operator surface, Block/OpenExO as organization design references, and Dan Martell as the adoption cadence for getting humans to use the system.
item.itunes:summary: A NotebookLM audio overview generated from a curated 13-source full-text pack comparing real AI operating systems for Brad Mills: llm-wiki/G-Brain/Hypatia as the knowledge kernel, Google OKF as the interoperability layer, Obsidian/Claude as an optional operator surface, Block/OpenExO as organization design references, and Dan Martell as the adoption cadence for getting humans to use the system.
